experience.description:

I combine my technical background with my passion for Building LLMs, GenAI models and Creating Content.

experience.description: I've created engaging, SEO-optimized blog content on tech topics for Techabhee, effectively boosting website traffic by monitoring analytics and adjusting content strategy for higher engagement and conversions.

f3d6d481-4d1f-4d53-bb39-0b37f0f0beb8.title: Abhinay Cherupally

personalInfo.title: Data Science — AI/ML Engineer — Full-Stack ML Developer

f3d6d481-4d1f-4d53-bb39-0b37f0f0beb8.summary: AI/ML Engineer with expertise in developing scalable machine learning and generative AI solutions, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Built NLP-based fake news detection system during internship at Intel by applying strong problem-solving skills. Published research on real-time retail theft detection using YOLOv8 and DeepSORT. Developed ResuMatch, a SaaS resume matching platform leveraging FastAPI, LangChain, vector databases, and NoSQL technologies. Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, FastAPI, LangChain, React.js, Node.js, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, AWS (Lambda, S3, EC2), and GCP. Strong experience in full-stack development, LLM integration, and deploying end-to-end AI/ML pipelines.

experience.description:
Built comprehensive fake news detection system using advanced NLP pipelines, RAG techniques, NoSQL databases, and classification models, demonstrating strong problem-solving skills to address complex data challenges
Implemented end-to-end ML workflows from data preprocessing to model evaluation and deployment on GCP infrastructure, applying problem-solving techniques to optimize performance
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on real-world AI applications with production-level requirements
Achieved high accuracy in text classification using transformer-based models and traditional ML techniques

Contributed to the design and deployment of an AI-powered Quality Control platform for appraisal document processing, helping achieve 60–80% reduction in manual review time.
Developed microservices using Flask REST APIs and integrated Next.js frontend components, working with ChromaDB for vector storage and implementing Dockerized deployments on AWS infrastructure.
Built ML pipelines integrating OpenAI GPT-4 and AWS models, implementing DSPy for document parsing workflows, QC rule verification logic, and multi-model fallback mechanisms.
Implemented authentication flows using JWT, created real-time dashboard components for monitoring, optimized parallel document processing pipelines, and ensured compliance with MISMO/FHA/UAD standards.

education.school: Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology (SNIST)

skills: AWS (Lambda, Elastic Beanstalk, S3, EC2, Fargate)

projects.name: ResuMatch - Hiring Assistant for HR
projects.description:
Collaborated in developing an AI-driven recruitment platform using React with TypeScript and FastAPI, integrating Mistral 7B LLM and OpenRouter APIs to automate resume parsing with 95% skill extraction accuracy.
Worked in engineering a scalable microservices architecture with SQLite and RESTful APIs, enabling role-based authentication and concurrent workflows for 100+ recruiters and applicants.
Co-designed a responsive UI using Tailwind CSS and React Context for real-time job postings and interactive resume visualization, increasing recruiter efficiency by 30%.
Contributed to Docker-based containerization and deployment on Vercel and Render, establishing CI/CD pipelines that reduced deployment time by 40%.

projects.name: Retail Theft Detection System
projects.description:
Developed an advanced retail theft detection framework using YOLOv8 and DeepSORT, delivering 95%+ object detection accuracy and robust multi-object tracking under varying lighting and occlusion conditions.
Implemented a scalable computer vision pipeline spanning data collection, annotation, model optimization, and deployment.
Leveraged Python and OpenCV to streamline video data extraction and preprocessing, improving detection speed by 20% while maintaining high accuracy.
Contributed to academic knowledge by publishing research outcomes in a peer-reviewed journal, highlighting novel applications of deep learning in retail security monitoring.

projects.name: MeetNote
projects.description:
Engineered a SaaS Chrome extension to capture and transcribe meeting audio in real-time using Whisper, achieving a 90% transcription accuracy rate and boosting user productivity.
Integrated state-of-the-art LLM models (Mistral and Whisper) for automatic summarization, delivering concise meeting highlights and reducing user review time by 35%.
Constructed the frontend with Next.js, React, and TypeScript and developed backend APIs with FastAPI and Python, ensuring scalable and efficient full-stack performance.
